episodes.title: Epstein victims’ lawyer ‘astonished’ by new details from earlier Palm Beach investigation
episodes.description:
Newly uncovered Epstein file notes reveal an FBI interview with a Palm Beach Atlantic student recruited by Ghislaine Maxwell in 2001, raising fresh questions about warning signs years before the case began with a 14-year-old victim.

episodes.title: A South Florida woman claims she was sex trafficked on Epstein Island, according to federal lawsuit
episodes.description:
A South Florida woman claims she was lured to Jeffrey Epstein's private island, where she was forced into heinous acts, according to a lawsuit filed by a Stuart-based attorney.
